evidence: `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:4648-4650` builds `RecordProducer::Agent` from `envelope.metadata.backend_used.family` and `envelope.metadata.model_used.model_id`, and `persist_stage_success` writes that producer onto the persisted `ArtifactRecord`.

The supporting artifact paths also use envelope metadata rather than configured targets: `src/contexts/workflow_composition/completion.rs:138-140`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/prompt_review.rs:111-114` and `170-173`, and `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:239-242`, `351-354`, `443-446`, and `559-562`.

`src/adapters/fs.rs:1084-1106` serializes the full `ArtifactRecord` with `serde_json::to_string_pretty(artifact)` and does not rewrite producer fields, so `backend_family` and `model_id` are persisted into `history/artifacts/*.json`.

Executable validation passed: `nix develop -c cargo check`, `nix develop -c cargo test --lib invoke_preserves_adapter_reported_backend_and_model_metadata`, and `nix develop -c cargo test --lib persisted_artifacts_use_envelope_metadata_not_resolved_target` all succeeded.

The regression coverage is aligned with the bug: `src/contexts/agent_execution/service.rs:402` verifies adapter-reported backend/model metadata survives invocation, and `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:1513` verifies persisted artifact JSON uses envelope metadata instead of the resolved target.
